text: Our Vision Is a World Free of Lung Disease Together, we can save lives by improving lung health, preventing lung disease, and creating a healthy world for all. Founded 120 years ago, the American Lung Association is the leading organization working to save lives by improving lung health and preventing lung disease through education, advocacy and research.

We provide resources to help countless individuals manage lung diseases, such as asthma, COPD, lung cancer and pulmonary fibrosis. We also help people overcome their addiction to tobacco products and live healthier lives. We support laws that put public health first. Policies that improve lung health, reduce tobacco use, protect us from secondhand smoke, and clean up air pollution.

Join our network of advocates to make your voice heard. Every year, we fund the best and the brightest in medical and scientific research to drive innovation, discover the unknown, and improve the lives of those living with lung disease. Do something healthy and fun with friends while supporting lung health and clean air.

Walk, run, cycle, stair-climb a skyscraper, do yoga or raise a toast at a gala. Learn and connect at an educational event or expo. Nearly half of U. S. children are breathing unhealthy air—putting their health at risk. While air quality has improved, millions still live with dangerous pollution, and recent rollbacks threaten hard‑won progress.

With your help, we're driving lung disease research, protecting youth from vaping, and advancing clean‑air laws. See how these efforts strengthen lung health and save lives every day. Get the facts about asthma—what it is, who it affects, and how it’s treated. Access trusted information to help you manage asthma or support someone who does.

The American Lung Association's Lung Health Navigators offer free, one‑on‑one support from trained respiratory professionals—by phone or online. Whether you’re a patient living with a chronic lung disease or a caregiver, join the Patient Caregiver Network to get direct access to timely education, support, and connection.

Your support helps us reach millions of people every year through education, advocacy and research. 90 cents of every dollar donated goes to program services Every donation to the American Lung Association supports those affected by lung disease through our programs and services. $225 million invested in groundbreaking research since 2000.

We bring together scientific leaders to advance lifesaving research. These critical investments help to fund scientists to unlock new treatments, therapies and cures for lung disease. The five-year lung cancer survival rate increased 52% over the past decade. Lung cancer survival is up 52%, screening rates have nearly quadrupled, and more than 1.

5 million people have taken the Saved By The Scan quiz to find out if they qualify for lifesaving screening. More than a million people have quit with Freedom From Smoking. The American Lung Association has helped over one million people quit smoking for good. Freedom From Smoking® is consistently ranked among the most effective cessation programs in the country.

Help Us Create a World Free of Lung Disease We are powered by everyday heroes and volunteers. Your support fuels our mission. Participate in an event, volunteer, become an advocate, or donate. Make a difference today. Get involved in your community and meet others who are passionate about lung health. Whether it's walk, climb, cycle or social event, there is something for everyone.
Freedom From Smoking Clinic - Long Beach, CA.
